options.name: -clock_tree
options.description: Reports the fanout of the source pin of all the clocks in design

options.name: -from
options.description: List or collection of pins, ports or nets for which fanout is desired.

options.name: -nosplit
options.description: Specifies that reports with long names will not be split into multiple lines

options.name: -view
options.description: View name for which disabled arcs shall be considered. (string, optional) > <fileName> # Name of the output file. (redirect_operator, optional) >> <fileName> # Name of the output file.
